name: Tufte Book VDQI
description: Edward Tufte-inspired book layout using tufte-book, with a VDQI-style title page and custom table of contents. Set title, author, edition/date, publisher, toc, top-level-division: chapter, epigraphs, dedication, and copyright metadata in YAML frontmatter.

features.description: Book part division with VDQI-style contents entry
Full-width block extending into the margin
